i_read_ua.description: Read current through compute port when weight=1 and wordline=VDD

i_leak_na.description: Leakage current through compute port when weight=0 and wordline=VDD

on_off_ratio.description: I_read / I_leak ratio — higher is better for compute accuracy

snm_mv.description: Static noise margin — cell must hold its data reliably

t_read_ns.description: Time for read current to reach 90% of steady state
